description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular metal head with a flat striking face on one side and a pointed spike on the opposite end, suggesting it is designed for both impact and puncturing tasks. The head is dark gray with metallic highlights and appears solid and heavy, likely made of steel or iron. The handle is long, cylindrical, and wrapped in a red grip with a spiral black and gold accent, providing both visual contrast and enhanced grip. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with a metallic collar, adding durability and strength. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually striking, suitable for heavy-duty urban or industrial use. No visible branding or damage is present, and the hammer appears well-crafted and in excellent condition.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a rectangular metal head featuring a flat face and a pointed spike, attached to a long, red and black spiral-wrapped handle. The design is robust and visually striking, ideal for demanding urban tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from the side, clearly displaying the flat striking face and the pointed spike on the head, as well as the full length of the spiral-wrapped handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed head-on, showing the square face of the head and the circular end of the handle, with the spiral grip partially visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the pointed spike and the flat face, mirroring view 0 but from the other side, with the handle's spiral pattern visible.
description_view_3: The hammer is shown from the back, displaying the broad, flat rear of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a red rubberized grip and black-gold spiral accent, designed for enhanced grip and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with a flat striking face on one side and a pointed spike on the opposite end, suitable for both impact and puncturing.
